title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
